documentation.description:
A rally point. Used to set a point when from GCS -> MAV. Also used to
return a point from MAV -> GCS.

record_types.name: Rally_Point

fields.name: Count
fields.description: Total number of points (for sanity checking).

fields.name: Alt
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Transit / loiter altitude relative to home.

fields.name: Break_Alt
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Break altitude relative to home.

fields.name: Land_Dir
fields.description:
Units: [cdeg]
Heading to aim for when landing.
